issues: Handling of special keys is incomplete. Line references in on_press function are missing handling for some special keys like [HOME], [END], [DELETE], etc.
Readability could be improved by adding comments to explain the purpose of each part of the code and defining constants for strings like '[SPACE]', '[ENTER]' (file and error handling sections).
summary: The code mostly aligns with the goal but lacks full handling of special keys. Readability can be enhanced with additional comments.
